```json
{
  "score": 3,
  "anchor": "Clean enough",
  "summary": "Solid level-3 architecture. Backend layers are cleanly separated: policy/ (pure business rules), services/ (db + orchestration), routes/ (HTTP), db/ (connection). All business constants and rules live only in policy/index.ts and are imported by services — no duplication detected (loanService.ts:3 imports * as policy). Domain errors form a named hierarchy (NotFoundError, ConflictError, etc.) used consistently in both services and handlers. No cycles (madge --circular empty), no god files (max 262 lines in loanService.ts), no orphans. Handlers contain only Zod validation and delegation — zero SQL or business logic inline (loan-handler.ts:55). Frontend has a types/ directory and a centralized useApi hook.\n\nPreventing level 4: (1) Services call db.prepare()/stmt.get()/stmt.run() directly with raw SQL rather than through a typed query module, so services are not unit-testable in isolation without a real DB; (2) frontend is organized by technical role (components/, hooks/, pages/) instead of by feature (e.g., checkout/, members/); (3) no evidence of shared types between frontend and backend — each side defines its own types independently. Preventing level 5: tests don't mirror source 1:1 (services.test.ts covers all services vs. per-file tests), and the route handler imports DatabaseInstance from db/ directly instead of going exclusively through services."
}
```

parsed.summary:
Solid level-3 architecture. Backend layers are cleanly separated: policy/ (pure business rules), services/ (db + orchestration), routes/ (HTTP), db/ (connection). All business constants and rules live only in policy/index.ts and are imported by services — no duplication detected (loanService.ts:3 imports * as policy). Domain errors form a named hierarchy (NotFoundError, ConflictError, etc.) used consistently in both services and handlers. No cycles (madge --circular empty), no god files (max 262 lines in loanService.ts), no orphans. Handlers contain only Zod validation and delegation — zero SQL or business logic inline (loan-handler.ts:55). Frontend has a types/ directory and a centralized useApi hook.

Preventing level 4: (1) Services call db.prepare()/stmt.get()/stmt.run() directly with raw SQL rather than through a typed query module, so services are not unit-testable in isolation without a real DB; (2) frontend is organized by technical role (components/, hooks/, pages/) instead of by feature (e.g., checkout/, members/); (3) no evidence of shared types between frontend and backend — each side defines its own types independently. Preventing level 5: tests don't mirror source 1:1 (services.test.ts covers all services vs. per-file tests), and the route handler imports DatabaseInstance from db/ directly instead of going exclusively through services.
